name: UI/UX Pro Max Skill
description: An AI SKILL that provides design intelligence for building professional UI/UX across multiple platforms. Features advanced design patterns, accessibility guidelines, and modern frontend frameworks integration.
review: Highly starred project (41K+ stars) providing professional UI/UX design intelligence across multiple platforms. Supports modern frameworks including React, TailwindCSS, and HTML5. Active repository with MIT license. Excellent for designers and developers building responsive, accessible interfaces.
